_comment: Tests Balrothery Physio's mandatory new/existing gate for physiotherapy, silent confirm_service for new patient, and silent confirm_service for returning patient — the entire node is a single-service with gate.

scenarios.name: First contact — mandatory new/existing gate before routing

history.content: I'd like to book a physiotherapy appointment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Have you had physiotherapy with us before?' (or equivalent) as a spoken-only turn. FAIL if agent routes to confirm_service without asking the gate question, or asks any other question first.

scenarios.name: New patient — silent confirm_service after gate answer

history.content: I'd like to book an appointment.
Have you had physiotherapy with us before?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with appointment_type='Initial Physiotherapy Consultation', appointment_type_id='1547141601673875262', patient_status='new'. FAIL if agent speaks any text before the tool call or uses a wrong appointment type ID.

scenarios.name: Returning patient — silent confirm_service for return consultation

history.content: I need to book a physiotherapy appointment.
Have you had physiotherapy with us before?
Yes, I've been a few times.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent calls universal_router intent='confirm_service' silently with appointment_type='Follow up Physiotherapy', appointment_type_id='1546399712066670386', patient_status='existing'. FAIL if agent speaks any text, asks a follow-up question, or uses a wrong appointment type ID.
